name: Computational Humor with Multimodal LLMs: Methods, Datasets, Evaluation, and Challenges

description: arXiv:2607.19011v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Multimodal humor in memes, cartoons, and comics remains difficult for AI systems because intended meaning depends on non-literal mechanisms, shared cultural knowledge, and communicative intent rather than literal scene description. This survey focuses on visual humor understanding in single-image and multi-panel artifacts, while treating humor g...
author: Tuo Liang, Zhe Hu, Disheng Liu, Jing Li, Yu Yin
